title: Opinion: Opinion | 330 Million: Why The Biggest Number In India's AI Boom Is The Most Useless One
summary_full: India has the largest crowd of AI users. But that number could be a vanity, pleasant to report in the morning and slow to pay by evening. Because who wants to pay for AI yet?
summary_public: India has the largest crowd of AI users. But that number could be a vanity, pleasant to report in the morning and slow to pay by evening. Because who wants to pay for AI yet?
